== Demon Lord's Tailbone ==
"The Demon Lord is a kind of economic being with many uses. Its meat is edible, its ribs are a soup ingredient, and its tailbone can be used to extract a potent medicine for strokes" --An Introduction to Abyssal Food Therapy

{{Organ Tabber
|Name=Demon Lord's Tailbone
|Rarity=purple
|ID Number=36
|Initial HP=30
|HP Increase=10
|Initial ATK=3
|ATK Increase=1
|Initial DEF=7
|DEF Increase=3
|Initial RUSH=3
|RUSH Increase=1
|Effect 1=In Demon Form, Snail ATK +###
|Initial Effect Value 1=2
|Effect Value Increase 1=2
|Effect 2=In Demon Form, Snail DEF +###
|Initial Effect Value 2=2
|Effect Value Increase 2=2
|Effect 3=
|Initial Effect Value 3=
|Effect Value Increase 3=
|Effect 4=
|Initial Effect Value 4=
|Effect Value Increase 4=
|}}

== Source ==
Organ Chest (4% chance), [[Fissure]] Fl. 166 reward

[[Category:Organs]]
[[Category:Purple Organs]]
__NOTOC__
